name: Market Intel
tagline: Live crypto & market news on G2
description: Real-time crypto prices, futures, stocks, and oil with AI-powered market sentiment. Breaking news alerts pop directly onto your G2 display. Tap to scroll coins, hold for news feed, double-tap to exit.
author: Grace Reel

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Fetches live crypto prices, futures, and market news from the Market Intel server
